name: Zoetis Inc.
summary: Zoetis Inc. is a global animal health company focused on the discovery, development, manufacture, and commercialization of medicines, vaccines, diagnostic products, biodevices, genetic tests, and precision animal health solutions. It serves eight core species across companion animals (dogs, cats, horses) and livestock (cattle, swine, poultry, fish, sheep). Key products include Apoquel, Cytopoint, Librela, Simparica, and Fostera. In 2025, the company reported total revenue of approximately $9.35 billion across U.S. and International segments.

products.name: Apoquel (oclacitinib)
products.description: First Janus kinase inhibitor in veterinary medicine for control of pruritus and atopic dermatitis in dogs.

products.name: Cytopoint (lokivetmab)
products.description: First canine monoclonal antibody to reduce clinical signs of atopic dermatitis and allergic dermatitis in dogs.

products.name: Librela (bedinvetmab)
products.description: First injectable monoclonal antibody therapy for alleviation of osteoarthritis pain in dogs.

products.name: Solensia (frunevetmab)
products.description: First injectable monoclonal antibody therapy for alleviation of osteoarthritis pain in cats.

products.name: Simparica (sarolaner)
products.description: Monthly oral chewable tablet to prevent fleas and ticks in dogs, launched February 2016.

products.name: Simparica Trio
products.description: Combines sarolaner, moxidectin, and pyrantel for protection against fleas, ticks, heartworm, and GI nematodes in dogs.

products.name: Revolution Plus/Stronghold Plus (selamectin/sarolaner)
products.description: Treatment for fleas, ticks, ear mites, lice, GI worms, and prevention of heartworm disease in cats.

products.name: Lenivia (izenivetmab)
products.description: First long-acting injectable monoclonal antibody therapy with three-month dosing interval for OA pain in dogs.

products.name: Core EQ Innovator
products.description: First and only equine vaccine containing all five core disease antigens in one combination, approved in U.S. in 2018.

products.name: Fostera/Suvaxyn PCV MH
products.description: Swine vaccine protecting against porcine circovirus-associated disease and enzootic pneumonia caused by M. hyopneumoniae.

products.name: Dectomax-CA1 Injectable
products.description: First parasite control product for prevention and treatment of New World screwworm myiasis in cattle; conditionally approved in U.S. in 2025.

products.name: Animal Health Diagnostics
products.description: Point-of-care diagnostic products, instruments, reagents, rapid immunoassay tests, reference laboratory kits and services, and blood glucose monitors.

partnerships.description: Zoetis was formerly a business unit of Pfizer before incorporation as an independent entity in July 2012.
